items.title: Lowe’s upgrades offer for loyal customers amid sluggish sales
items.description: There’s just something about fixing, decorating, and improving your home, somewhere you have peace, spend quality time with your family, and relax. It's a place that should reflect your character and lifestyle. People felt that more than ever during the Covid pandemic lockdowns, when they ...

items.title: House Overwhelmingly Passes Bipartisan Housing Bill To Tackle Affordability Crisis, Push Localities To Build More Homes
items.description: Housing package passes House, aims to address affordability crisis by encouraging more home construction and reducing barriers. Senate next.

items.title: Dow Jones' revolving door: What happened to 5 companies after that were dropped from the DJIA
items.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) is the oldest stock index in America. Founded in 1896 by Charles Dow, Edward Jones, and Charles Bergstresser, it’s considered a benchmark for the performance of the country’s large, blue-chip companies—those big household names, like Home Depot (HD), Johnson ...
